title: AISMM Bundle 0 — Product Core Schema
description: Full data schema for AISMM Bundle 0: Product Core (Definition, Value & Economics). This schema expands all required Bundle 0 layers into one machine-readable JSON structure.

cross_layer_links.description: Optional explicit links between entities of different Bundle 0 layers.

id.description: Stable AISMM identifier, e.g. product.orkestron_ai or module.billing.

reference.description: Reference to another AISMM entity or external file, e.g. entity.workflow or file:vss.schema.json.
